description_long: This is a modern bungalow surrounded by lush landscaping, featuring a flat white roof with green vegetation growing on top and cascading down the sides. The structure is composed of clean, geometric lines with a mix of white and brown exterior walls, large glass windows, and a prominent balcony area. A rectangular swimming pool is situated in the front yard, bordered by a wooden deck and manicured shrubs. The property is enclosed by a circular arrangement of trees and bushes, providing privacy and a natural aesthetic. The bungalow appears to have two stories, with the upper floor partially cantilevered over the lower level. The overall design emphasizes open space, integration with nature, and contemporary architectural elements.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a front swimming pool, surrounded by dense landscaping and trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, balcony, and swimming pool with surrounding greenery.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the pool, deck, and the lush landscaping on the right side of the bungalow.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by dense trees and bushes, with less visibility of the building's facade.
description_view_3: Side view showing the flat roof, upper balcony, and a mix of white and brown wall sections with visible vegetation.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and balcony openings
